# Callout Types

## Standard Callouts

> [!note] A Note
> This is a note callout with informational content.

> [!tip] Pro Tip
> Use keyboard shortcuts to speed up your workflow.

> [!warning] Warning
> This action cannot be undone.

> [!danger] Danger
> Do not run this in production.

> [!important] Important
> Read the documentation before proceeding.

## Other Callouts

> [!info] Information
> Additional context for this section.

> [!question] FAQ
> How does the vault indexer work?

> [!example] Example
> Here is a code snippet:
> `cargo test -p noted-lsp`

> [!quote] Quote
> "Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication." — Leonardo da Vinci

> [!abstract] Summary
> This file tests all callout types supported by Obsidian.
